General.Name: Artiva Biotherapeutics, Inc. Common Stock
General.Description: Artiva Biotherapeutics, Inc., a clinical-stage biotechnology company, focuses on developing natural killer (NK) cell-based therapies for patients suffering from autoimmune diseases and cancers. Its lead product candidate includes AlloNK, an off-the-shelf NK cell therapy for patients with autoimmune diseases and cancers, such as rheumatoid arthritis, systemic lupus erythematosus, lupus nephritis, rheumatoid arthritis, pemphigus vulgaris, the anti-neutrophil cytoplasmic antibody -associated vasculitis subtypes granulomatosis with polyangiitis/microscopic polyangiitis, and B-cell-non-Hodgkin lymphoma. The company also develops AB-201, an allogeneic anti- human epidermal growth factor receptor 2 targeting chimeric antigen receptor (CAR)-NK cell product candidate for the treatment of various solid tumors, such as breast, gastric and esophageal, and bladder cancers; and AB-205, an allogeneic anti-CD5 CAR-NK cell product candidate for the treatment of hematological malignancies. Artiva Biotherapeutics, Inc. was incorporated in 2019 and is headquartered in San Diego, California.
General.Address: 5505 Morehouse Drive, San Diego, CA, United States, 92121
